description_long: This object appears to be a large, flat-bladed knife or sword with a distinctive L-shaped profile. The blade is broad and rectangular, with a straight edge and a squared-off tip, suggesting it may be designed for heavy-duty chopping or cleaving. The handle is integrated into the shorter segment of the L-shape, appearing as a solid extension of the blade without a pronounced grip or ergonomic contour. The entire object has a uniform, matte gray coloration, indicating it is likely made from a single piece of metal, possibly steel. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or texturing on the surface, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The object is relatively thin in cross-section, with a flat surface and no visible guard or sheath.
description: A large, L-shaped, flat-bladed knife or sword with a broad, rectangular blade and a simple, integrated handle. The object is matte gray, solid, and utilitarian with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The object is seen from the side, showing the full L-shaped profile and the broad, flat blade with a squared tip.
description_view_1: Viewed from an angle, the thickness of the blade and the transition to the handle are visible, emphasizing the flatness and solid construction.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the straight edge and the rectangular blade, with the handle segment extending perpendicularly.
description_view_3: From this angle, the handle is more prominent, and the overall flatness and lack of detail on the surface are apparent.
attribute_handle_design: straight, integrated, no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping
